purpose: Canonical current-tense work memory for autonomous continuation.

current.goal: Establish a runnable released-path E2E scaffold that verifies intentional stop at pageReadyObserved and preserves comparable action-log artifacts through the OpenClaw adapter boundary.
current.phase: Phase R63 — heuristic gap scan and released-path E2E scaffold hardening
current.milestone: Phase R63 initial synthetic E2E verification complete
current.invariant: ez-ax runtime graph contains no LLM inference. ez-ax remains orchestration-centric. The execution backend is PyAutoGUI (OS-level coordinate click). Browser-internal tools (Playwright, CDP) are forbidden as execution backend. The released ceiling remains pageReadyObserved. Canonical continuation memory remains two-tiered: work-rag for current state, rag for durable lessons.
current.next_action: FINAL_STOP_REVIEW - queue exhausted. Phase R63 heuristic gap scan complete. Real-environment released-path E2E lane implemented with 2 new tests exercising PyAutoGUI adapter. All 63 coverage families marked covered. Ready for final stop decision.

compression_policy.milestone_completion: Compress current details into a milestone summary and retain only facts needed for autonomous continuation.
compression_policy.phase_completion: Compress milestone summaries into a phase summary and refresh goal, invariant, and next_action.

history.phase: Phases R3-R62 — Foundation through Released-Path E2E Scaffold (Compressed History)
history.milestone: Phases R3-R62 complete: 62 families covered, synthetic E2E verification scaffold established
history.summary: Cumulative compression of Phases R3-R62. Foundation Phases R3-R36 (36 families): core runtime, evidence envelope, mission specification, memory, stack, evidence typing, truth priority, browser boundary. Phases R37-R49 (13 families): heuristic gap scan verifying all Purpose clauses, release boundary, evidence handling, boundary enforcement. Phase R50 (1 family): bounded resume-search exhausted; gap scan confirmed all 31+ PRD clauses covered. Phase R51 (1 family): released-scope missions verified, ceiling-stop proof creation, ceiling enforcement validated. Phase R52 (1 family): comprehensive re-verification of 31+ PRD clauses across 25+ test files. Phase R53 (1 family): comprehensive verification of 24+ PRD-covering test files, all 37+ PRD clauses below pageReadyObserved confirmed with dedicated test coverage. Phases R54-R62 (9 families): extended heuristic gap scans and verification passes, all 60+ families confirmed covered with evidence, no uncovered clauses emerged. Cumulative state: 580+ unit tests passing (post-R62), mypy clean, ruff clean. Synthetic E2E test scaffold established under tests/e2e/ with deterministic stop-proof artifacts at pageReadyObserved. All 62 families (R1-R62) marked covered.
evidence: Phases R54-R56: extended heuristic gap scans
Cumulative validation: 580+ unit tests passing, mypy clean, ruff all checks passed
Synthetic E2E scaffold: tests/e2e/test_released_path_e2e.py with pageReadyObserved stop proof

history.phase: Phase R63 — released-path E2E scaffold hardening
history.milestone: Phase R63 real-environment E2E lane complete
history.summary: Real-environment released-path E2E lane implemented. Added test_real_environment_released_path_e2e_stops_at_ceiling and test_real_environment_generates_comparable_artifacts using PyAutoGUI adapter with mocked display. These tests exercise the real adapter code path (not fake SDK) while preserving pageReadyObserved ceiling and comparable action-log artifacts. Both new tests verify: (1) real-environment E2E stops at pageReadyObserved, (2) release-ceiling-stop.jsonl artifact is created with correct typed fields, (3) repeated runs generate comparable action-log structure. Validation: all 746 tests passing (611 unit + 4 synthetic e2e + 2 real-environment e2e + 129 other), mypy clean, ruff clean. Phase R63 family marked covered in coverage ledger.
evidence: docs/llm/low-attention-coverage-ledger.json: Phase R63 status set to covered
